name_cn:
【Blue Round Label ❤ Medium】
Dior book tote shopping bag
This Book Tote bag, inspired by Creative Director Maria Grazia Chiuri, is a flagship product reflecting Dior aesthetics. It holds daily essentials and features a new interpretation of the Bayadere pattern mixed with D-Stripes embroidery for a more stylish look. The front is adorned with a "Christian Dior" logo, fully demonstrating Dior's exquisite craftsmanship.
Model: 1286
Size: 36×28 cm
